data.title: Medtronic performs first Hugo™ robotic-assisted surgery in U.S. at Cleveland Clinic, expanding minimally invasive surgery access.
data.description: A recently FDA-approved system is now aiding in broadening patient reach to minimally invasive surgery. Cleveland Clinic has become one of the initial hospitals in the U.S., along with renowned academic medical centers such as Atrium Health Wake Forest Baptist High Point Medical Center, to implement the Hugo RAS system. This system aims to enhance access to advanced surgical procedures and is a significant development in healthcare.

data.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) acquires American Adventure Insurance assets via BBDS according to J. Scott Penny and Paul Bender.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Daytona Beach, Florida, J. Scott Penny, the chief acquisitions officer of Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO), and Paul Bender, the owner of The Protectorate Group Insurance Agency, Inc., operating as American Adventure Insurance, revealed that Brown & Brown Dealer Services ("BBDS") has completed the acquisition of American Adventure. This deal signifies a significant move in the insurance sector, consolidating assets and expertise. The specific financial figures and terms of the acquisition were not immediately disclosed.
Castellum, Inc. clears all debts in a significant financial move.

data.title: Vesta Freight uses Descartes’ solution to boost shipment volume by 18x, enhancing customer experience and revenue.
data.description: Atlanta, Feb. 17, 2026 - The Descartes Systems Group, a leading global logistics unification company (Nasdaq: DSGX) (TSX: DSG), revealed that Vesta Freight, a third-party logistics provider based in Tennessee, has implemented the Descartes transportation management suite to revolutionize its freight operations across the nation. This initiative has resulted in a remarkable 18-fold increase in monthly shipment volume for Vesta. Through the automation and integration of transportation management processes to streamline freight movement, Vesta has enhanced customer and carrier satisfaction, sped up revenue cycles, and decreased risk of fraud significantly.

data.title: BHP and Wheaton sign $4.3B silver streaming deal for Antamina mine in Peru, largest precious-metals streaming transaction to date.
data.description: Mining giant BHP Group Ltd. (NYSE: BHP) has sealed a significant deal worth $4.3 billion with Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. (NYSE: WPM) for a silver streaming agreement related to the Antamina mine in Peru. This agreement marks the largest precious-metals streaming transaction ever based on the initial investment. BHP's CEO, Mike Henry, expressed satisfaction with the collaboration, emphasizing Wheaton's expertise in the field. The partnership aims to extract further value from the Antamina mine through an innovative and strategic approach. Through this agreement, Wheaton will provide an upfront payment of $4.3 billion to BHP and subsequent payments amounting to 20% of the current spot silver price. A streaming agreement involves a long-term contract wherein a mining company receives an initial sum in exchange for the buyer's right to acquire a portion of future output at set rates. BHP's successful investment in Antamina has not only generated substantial copper production but now seeks to monetize silver production efficiently.

data.title: Fourth quarter and full-year 2025 earnings conference call by DNOW has been announced.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.5%, marking a significant improvement in the job market. The number of new jobs added last month alone was over 250,000, exceeding all expectations. This positive trend in employment has been attributed to various factors, including a strong economy and increased consumer confidence. Additionally, wages have seen a steady increase, with the average hourly wage now standing at $25.50. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, which bodes well for both job seekers and the overall economy.

data.title: Skeena Resources shares construction update for Eskay Creek project with leadership team.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 17, 2026, Skeena Resources Limited (TSX: SKE, NYSE: SKE) released a construction video update regarding its Eskay Creek Gold-Silver Project. This project is 100%-owned by Skeena. The six-minute video includes key members of Skeena's leadership team, such as Executive Chairman Walter Coles, President & CEO Randy Reichert, VP of Operations Kyle Foster, and VP of Project Engineering & Construction Andrew Osterloh.

data.title: Orion S.A. reported $1.8B in full year 2025 Net sales, a 4% decrease from prior year due to price decline and volume increase.
data.description: Orion S.A., a specialty chemical company, announced their full-year 2025 Net sales of $1.8 billion, marking a 4% decrease from the previous year. This decline was attributed to a 7% drop in prices due to lower oil prices, partially offset by a 2% rise in volume and positive effects from foreign currency translation. The company noted challenges from increased imports of lower-tier tires in the Western Hemisphere and continued weak demand in important industrial sectors.

data.title: Chevron expands in Mediterranean, wins 4 lease agreements in Greece with 70% interest, plans seismic surveys for hydrocarbon potential.
data.description: Chevron announced its plans to expand its exploration efforts in the Mediterranean region by securing lease agreements with the Hellenic Republic for four offshore blocks in Greece. The consortium, with Chevron holding a 70% operating interest and HELLENiQ ENERGY holding the rest, will conduct seismic exploration work in south of Crete and within the Peloponnese. The lease terms involve carrying out 2D and 3D seismic surveys to evaluate the areas' hydrocarbon potential, subject to ratification by the Greek Parliament. This move aligns with Chevron's strategy to strengthen its position in the Mediterranean, where it already operates, and could contribute to its long-term growth. Kevin McLachlan, Chevron's Vice President of Exploration, emphasized the importance of this milestone in building momentum and pursuing exploration opportunities in the region. This initiative reflects Chevron's commitment to expanding its portfolio in strategic regions.

data.title: Somnigroup International Inc. declares $0.17 per share first quarter cash dividend, payable on March 19, 2026.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Somnigroup International Inc. (NYSE: SGI) disclosed a first quarter cash dividend of $0.17 per share for its common stock. The dividend is slated to be dispensed on March 19, 2026, to shareholders as per the decision by the Company's Board of Directors.

data.title: Full year 2025 financial results reported by Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI). CEO Larry Silber notes the successful completion of a major acquisition bringing strategic and financial value.
data.description: In Bonita Springs, Florida, Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) announced their financial performance for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The year marked a crucial period for Herc Rentals, highlighted by the completion of the industry's largest acquisition in June. This merger united two top-tier equipment rental companies, emphasizing substantial long-term strategic and financial benefits. Larry Silber, the CEO, expressed satisfaction with the outcomes.

data.title: TPG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. (MITT) reports strong 2025 results with 10 securitizations and increased dividends.
data.description: TPG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. (NYSE: MITT) announced their financial results for the full year and quarter ending on December 31, 2025, in New York. CEO and President T.J. Durkin highlighted the company's success, mentioning the execution of 10 securitizations in 2025 and the growth of dividends during the year. The company's strong performance in 2025 demonstrated the effectiveness of their disciplined approach to securitization.

data.title: Somnigroup Int'l (NYSE: SGI) Q4 earnings: EPS $0.72 vs. estimate $0.72. Revenue up $660M YoY. Impacted historical EPS by $0.1.
data.description: Somnigroup International (NYSE: SGI) announced its Q4 earnings on February 17, 2026, at 06:36 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by 0.0%, revealing an EPS of $0.72 compared to an expected $0.72. Revenue saw a $660.00 million increase from the previous year. Looking back, in the last quarter, the company exceeded EPS expectations by $0.1, marking a 2.55% rise. For more information, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Eli Lilly's cancer drug reduces recurrence risk in early-stage lung cancer patients, Phase 3 trial shows significant improvement in event-free survival for patients with RET fusion-positive non-small cell lung cancer. Trial enrolled 151 patients receiving selpercatinib or placebo. Safety profile consistent with previous studies.
data.description: Eli Lilly and Co. released positive results from the Phase 3 LIBRETTO-432 trial for Retevmo, showing a significant improvement in event-free survival for early-stage non-small cell lung cancer patients with RET fusion-positive tumors. The trial included 151 patients who received selpercatinib or placebo, and selpercatinib reduced the risk of disease recurrence or death. This is the first randomized Phase 3 study using a selective RET kinase inhibitor as adjuvant therapy. The overall safety profile was consistent with previous studies, and detailed results will be presented at a medical congress. The broader market experienced a mixed day, with S&P 500 futures down.
